description: Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather handbag from hidekraft. With short handles, legs at the base and stitch detailing, this bag in bottle green makes for a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Height: 27 cm Length: 41.5 cmWidth: 7 cmMade from genuine leather for durabilityHas two roomy zipped compartments, with organiser sleeves, an inner zipped compartment and a small zipped pocketOne insert pocket on the frontOne zipped pocket at the back for enhanced spaceTwo short handles for carrying ease and styleBrand name embossed on the frontBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
